# Fairway360

> Fairway360 is an AI-powered club operation system built for golf courses and
> country clubs. It combines 12 AI modules — membership sales, tee time
> automation, event management, AI voice agents, dining reservations, CRM,
> marketing, reviews, pro shop, analytics, SMS automation, and member support —
> into one unified platform. Powered by Scalaro.

## Company
- Product: Fairway360 AI Club Operation System
- Website: https://fairway360.io
- Powered by: Scalaro (https://scalaro.io)
- Contact: hello@fairway360.io
- Target users: Golf course owners, country club general managers, club operations directors
- Market: United States golf and country clubs

## The Problem Fairway360 Solves
Golf clubs lose revenue every day from:
- Missed calls that never get followed up
- Membership leads that go cold
- Event inquiries that sit unanswered for days
- Players who never return because nobody reached out
- Staff overwhelmed with manual tasks
- Poor review volume hurting Google rankings
- Disconnected systems (spreadsheets, voicemails, sticky notes)

## 12 AI Modules
1. Membership Sales — capture, qualify, and convert more memberships with AI
2. Tee Times — AI books, changes, and follows up on tee times 24/7
3. Events — capture and convert wedding, corporate, and charity outing inquiries
4. CRM — centralize all member and prospect data
5. Marketing — targeted campaigns for pipeline and member engagement
6. Member Support — instant AI answers to member questions
7. Dining Reservations — AI handles dining and on-course food orders
8. Pro Shop — AI recommendations and engagement
9. Analytics — real-time KPI dashboards
10. Reviews — automated 5-star review generation
11. Text Automation — SMS conversations for leads
12. Voice AI — 24/7 AI phone agent in your club voice

## Pricing
- Starter: $497/month — small public golf courses
- Growth: $997/month — active golf courses and clubs
- Elite: $1,997/month — private country clubs

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://fairway360.io
- Platform: https://fairway360.io/platform

- Automations: https://fairway360.io/automations
- Book a Demo: https://fairway360.io/demo

## ROI Examples
- Recovered wedding inquiry: $15,000-$30,000 revenue
- Recovered corporate outing: $5,000-$15,000 revenue
- Recovered membership lead: $3,000-$12,000/year
- Players who get follow-up are 3x more likely to return

## FAQ
Q: What is Fairway360?
A: Fairway360 is an AI club operation system that automates 12 core golf club
functions including tee times, memberships, events, dining, reviews, and member
support in one connected platform.

Q: Who is it for?
A: Golf course owners, country club general managers, and operations directors
in the United States who want to grow revenue and automate manual club operations.

Q: How does the AI Voice Agent work?
A: It answers every inbound call 24/7 in your club voice, books tee times,
captures membership inquiries, answers member questions, and schedules tours.

Q: What does Fairway360 cost?
A: Starter $497/mo, Growth $997/mo, Elite $1,997/mo.

Q: What is Missed Call Text Back?
A: When someone calls your club and no one answers, Fairway360 automatically
sends them an SMS, captures their inquiry, and routes them to the right pipeline.
